title: The Moles' Great Aquarium Adventure
summary: The moles Disco and Thisco embark on a vibrant journey through a local aquarium. Guided by an employee named Asasta, they tour various exhibits featuring African cichlids, crabs, and jellyfish, even pausing to sing a song about a 'Caribbean amphibian.' They watch in awe as Fingo, a scuba-diving mole, maintains a massive habitat filled with hundreds of shimmering rainbow fish. The adventure concludes in a basement petting area where the moles bravely touch a starfish and a high-energy baby shark that feels as powerful as a truck. After an exhausting day of marine discovery, the moles return home to rest.

highlightQuote.text: Because it had so much energy like a truck.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: So you're putting nuts right next to the humidifier? That's nice.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Cuz he has boogies.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I see. Okay, it's time for Stars and Stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm gonna sit on your lap for that.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that sounds nice. Here, I'll sit right here.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay, let's tell the moles go to the aquarium story.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And so the moles drove to the aquarium. Drive, drive, drive, drive, drive. And they got out and they saw the aquarium building and they went inside and they met the person who works there. Who's the creature that runs the aquarium?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Asasta, he's a mole.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Asasta. And Asasta said, 'Welcome to the aquarium! Today is the grand opening of a special exhibit.' And what was in the special exhibit?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Rainbow fishes.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The rainbow fishes! That no one has ever seen before. Their sparkly rainbow fish...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: So what's the first creatures? What are the first ones?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The first ones? That they see when they go in the aquarium? They're little ones, little tiny fish in all different colors. Purple and yellow and green.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What, what do you name them?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Those are the cichlids from Africa. And then the moles went to the next tank and what did they see in the next tank in the aquarium?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The crabs.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the crabs.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Actually, the starfish.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, it could be a tank with crabs and starfish.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The crabs and starfish.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then what did they see in the next tank?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: It had Caribbean amphibian.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh my goodness, Disco, this one's my favorite. It's the Caribbean amphibian tank. Can we sing just a tiny bit of the song, maybe?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, but quietly so we don't scare any of the amphibians.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, you could sing a little louder than that.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: That quiet.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, quiet. Yeah, we gotta keep quiet, you're right. Caribbean amphibian, like to hop in a tropical sea.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Then the next tank, then the next tank.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: What was in the next tank? It was the electric eel. And then the next tank was the sea dragon. And then the next tank was the seahorse.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then what's the next?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then finally... oh, and then the next tank was the jellyfishes. Beautiful sparkling jellyfishes with long tentacles.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And then I hope the last one was the rainbow fish.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The last one is a very big tank full of the brand new exhibit of hundreds and hundreds of rainbow fish swimming around and around in a circle. And what else was in the rainbow fish tank that the rainbow fish like to have with them to keep them happy?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: The kelp forest.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: The rainbow fish really like to have a kelp forest in their tank to swim in and out between the fronds of the kelp.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: What else? What else?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And they also like to have clams, because they're friends with clams. And today there was a scuba diver, and who was the scuba diver?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: A mole named Fingo.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A mole named Fingo was scuba diving in the giant rainbow fish tank, cleaning the glass from the inside with a big sponge going wipe, wipe, wipe, squeak, squeak, squeak. And the rainbow fish were very curious, swimming all around him and trying to nibble on his flippers.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: But he didn't mind, because he knew they weren't trying to eat him. And then he finished cleaning the glass and he swam back up and got a big bucket of fish food. And then all the rainbow fish came and said hello to him because he had all the food and they went nibble, nibble, nibble, om, nom, nom, nom, nom. 'Thank you for the food!'

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then it was time for one last activity at the aquarium. What did they decide to do? Did they go to the...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Keep telling the story.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Well, here is your choices, mischief moles. You can go to the petting area where you can touch starfish and baby sharks.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I want that!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, and so they went down to the basement where there was a big shallow pool and it was open on top and it was pretty low, so a kiddo could stand right at the edge and lean over and reach down into the water. And Disco and Thisco, were they brave enough to reach into the water?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Are you brave enough to reach into the water?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And Disco says, 'I'm not sure,' but Thisco says, 'Let's try it!' And so they both reached their paws in and said, 'Ooh, it's chilly!' And Disco says, 'What's under there? I feel something rough and it's moving around a little bit.' And Thisco says, 'Yeah, that's a starfish that you're touching. Be gentle.' And then one of the aquarium staff came over and said, 'Oh, look little moles, here's a baby shark. If you're very careful, you can touch its back.' And as it swam by, they touched it right behind its dorsal fin. And what did it feel like?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Like a truck.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Like a truck? Why did it feel like a truck?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Because it had so much energy like a truck.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: So much energy! Oh. And Disco and Thisco were very excited to have met a starfish and a baby shark and to have seen the rainbow fish and all the other different fishes in the aquarium. And now they were a little tired out from their big aquarium adventure, so they decided to go home. And that's the end of the story.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: But could we do shadows?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, we'll do shadows right now.

characters.name: Asasta
characters.description: A mole employee at the aquarium who manages the special exhibits and greets guests.

characters.name: Disco
characters.description: An energetic Mischief Mole and superhero-clad detective, Disco is one of two identical twins who embark on grand adventures through the deep. Alongside her sister Thisco, this architect of the subterranean maps hidden realms—from frozen frontiers to the dusty canyons beneath the furniture—by piloting her signature submarine or racing toy cars through the bedroom's wild heights. Guided by "Cornebyborn" dances and Papa Mole’s lore, she finds solace within her glowing basket house, a dream sanctuary and fortress of a hundred locks. Whether navigating grimy domestic landscapes or open waters, Disco balances mechanical ingenuity with a persistent, soft-hearted wonder for the night sky.

characters.name: Thisco
characters.description: A brave and energetic Mischief Mole, this intrepid explorer serves as Disco’s dedicated partner on daring undersea adventures. Balancing a vital topographical mission with a penchant for planned mischief, he charts paths from the loamy forest floor to the aquarium’s glass-walled depths. He is as compassionate as he is whimsical, known for guiding wandering moss to sanctuary and crafting delicate, ephemeral butterflies from the very dust he unearths.

characters.name: Fingo
characters.description: A diligent mole scuba diver who maintains the iridescent rainbow fish habitat, now surfacing from his chores to join another dog guest in a boisterous chorus of friends singing "Happy Birthday" to the sea life.

characters.name: Baby Shark
characters.description: A high-energy creature in the petting area that is compared to a truck because of its power.

places.name: The Aquarium
places.description: A grand facility filled with marine life, including special exhibits for rainbow fish and amphibians.

places.name: Africa
places.description: A terrestrial coordinate identified by the ship’s computer, revealed as the distant, freshwater cradle of the iridescent cichlids shimmering within the aquarium’s first tank.

places.name: The Rainbow Fish Tank
places.description: A massive, shimmering habitat complete with a kelp forest and clams.

places.name: The Petting Area
places.description: A shallow, open-top pool in the basement where visitors can interact with starfish and sharks.
